violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food items stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing. Vacuum sealing deli meats and raw meat without a HACCP plan.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cutting boards in the meat dept are gouged and are in need of resurfacing.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Edges of the table with the meat slicer on it are chipped and no longer a cleanable surface.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
